zh.Longherdmanston, Midlothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar於1330年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾比格亞時，他的父親Sir Malcolm Fleming21歲，母親Christina Keith11歲。他於1351年之前與Jean Barclay在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1406年2月14日在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年76歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar于1330年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾比格亞时，他的父亲Sir Malcolm Fleming21岁，母亲Christina Keith11岁。他于1351年之前与Jean Barclay在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1406年2月14日在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安享年76岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar was born in 1330, in Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Malcolm Fleming, was 21 and his mother, Christina Keith, was 11. He married Jean Barclay before 1351, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 14 February 1406, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar est né en 1330, à Biggar, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Malcolm Fleming, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Christina Keith, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Jean Barclay avant 1351, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1406, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Edinburgh, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar 1330 in Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Malcolm Fleming 21 und seine Mutter Christina Keith 11. Er hat vor 1351 in Scotland Jean Barclay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1406 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Edinburgh, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar è nato il nel 1330 nel Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Malcolm Fleming, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Christina Keith, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Jean Barclay prima del 1351, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1406, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Edinburgh, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggarが1330年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアビグガーで生まれた時，父Sir Malcolm Flemingは21歳，母Christina Keithは11歳であった。1351年以前にスコットランドでJean Barclayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1406年2月14日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンで76歳で死去し，スコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar(이)가 1330년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 비가에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Malcolm Fleming(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Keith(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1351년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Jean Barclay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1406년 2월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar nasceu em 1330, em Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Malcolm Fleming, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Christina Keith, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Jean Barclay antes 1351, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1406, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Edinburgh, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar родился в 1330 г. в местности бигар, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Malcolm Fleming было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Christina Keith, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Jean Barclay перед 1351 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 14 февраля 1406 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности эдинбург, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar nació en 1330, en Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Malcolm Fleming, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Christina Keith, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Jean Barclay antes de 1351, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1406, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Edinburgh, Scotland.
